diff: The "Chronicle Point Reward Instance" refers to the Ethereum mainnet reward mechanism through which USDS is deposited in Sky's Rewards contract to accrue Chronicle Points. Onchain, this instance is the verified `StakingRewards` contract at the address corresponding to the `REWARDS_USDS_01` key in the Chainlog.
summary: Add Ecosystem Accord Between Sky And Grove
description: Adds Ecosystem Accord 10, establishing compensation to Grove for the Chronicle Point Reward Instance at 20% of Base Rate on USDS deposited in the Rewards contract, retroactive to July 24, 2025.
